title: FoxGate missing Robin liveness check
description: FoxGate Step 1 checked registry, skills, and signals but did not verify Robin was online. Alfred proceeded through audit without noticing Robin was dead for 7+ hours. Batman had to intervene.
fix: Added Robin liveness as Step 1 Item 1 in FoxGate SKILL.md. Must check bridge-heartbeat.json freshness before any other audit step.
